languages.text: "Ими пронизана вся платформа, мирянин. Невозможно низкий коэффициент износа металла, Движущая Сила, берущаяся из ниоткуда, полное отсутствие установленной заповедями технических карт термической перегрузки. Когда ты взглянешь на анкер-ядро, то са{mf|м|ма} все поймешь".

"This entire platform is suffused with evidence, layperson. The impossibly low metal degradation ratio, the Motive Force being supplied with no identifiable source, the complete absence of thermal overload described in the sacred tech-designs. When you see the anchor-core, you will understand."
languages.original_text: "Ими пронизана вся платформа, мирянин. Невозможно низкий коэффициент износа металла, Движущая Сила, берущаяся из ниоткуда, полное отсутствие установленной заповедями технических карт термической перегрузки. Когда ты взглянешь на анкер-ядро, то са{mf|м|ма} все поймешь".

languages.text: 「このプラットフォーム全体は証拠に満ちている、一般の人よ。ありえないほど低い金属の劣化率、動機付け力が特定できない供給源から供給されていること、聖なる技術設計書に記述されている熱過負荷の完全な欠如。アンカーコアを見ればわかるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "This entire platform is suffused with evidence, layperson. The impossibly low metal degradation ratio, the Motive Force being supplied with no identifiable source, the complete absence of thermal overload described in the sacred tech-designs. When you see the anchor-core, you will understand."

traits.locale_text: 「このプラットフォーム全体は証拠に満ちている、一般の人よ。ありえないほど低い金属の劣化率、動機付け力が特定できない供給源から供給されていること、聖なる技術設計書に記述されている熱過負荷の完全な欠如。アンカーコアを見ればわかるだろう。」

languages.text: “整个平台都是证据，教外人士。低到不可思议的金属降解率，来源不明的源力，神圣科技蓝图里描述的热过载也完全不存在。等见到锚核，你就明白了。”
languages.original_text: "This entire platform is suffused with evidence, layperson. The impossibly low metal degradation ratio, the Motive Force being supplied with no identifiable source, the complete absence of thermal overload described in the sacred tech-designs. When you see the anchor-core, you will understand."

traits.locale_text: “整个平台都是证据，教外人士。低到不可思议的金属降解率，来源不明的源力，神圣科技蓝图里描述的热过载也完全不存在。等见到锚核，你就明白了。”

languages.text: "Bu platformun tamamı kanıtlarla dolu avam. İmkânsız derecede düşük metal bozunum oranı, tanımlanabilir hiçbir kaynağı olmadan sağlanan Devinim Gücü, kutsal tekno tasarımlarda açıklanan termal aşırı yüklenmenin tamamen yokluğu... Çapa çekirdeği kendini belli edecektir."
languages.original_text: "This entire platform is suffused with evidence, layperson. The impossibly low metal degradation ratio, the Motive Force being supplied with no identifiable source, the complete absence of thermal overload described in the sacred tech-designs. When you see the anchor-core, you will understand."

traits.locale_text: "Bu platformun tamamı kanıtlarla dolu avam. İmkânsız derecede düşük metal bozunum oranı, tanımlanabilir hiçbir kaynağı olmadan sağlanan Devinim Gücü, kutsal tekno tasarımlarda açıklanan termal aşırı yüklenmenin tamamen yokluğu... Çapa çekirdeği kendini belli edecektir."

languages.text: «La plataforma está llena de pruebas, laic{mf|o|a}. La tasa de desgaste de metal es demasiado baja para ser posible, la Fuerza Motriz de origen no identificado, la ausencia total de la sobrecarga térmica descrita por los sagrados diseños. Cuando vea el núcleo de anclaje, lo entenderá».
languages.original_text: "This entire platform is suffused with evidence, layperson. The impossibly low metal degradation ratio, the Motive Force being supplied with no identifiable source, the complete absence of thermal overload described in the sacred tech-designs. When you see the anchor-core, you will understand."

languages.text: « Cette plateforme entière est remplie de preuves, profane. Le taux de dégradation métallique incroyablement faible, la Force Motrice fournie sans source identifiable, l'absence totale de surcharge thermique décrite dans les technoplans sacrés. Vous comprendrez tout en voyant le noyau ancestral. »
languages.original_text: "This entire platform is suffused with evidence, layperson. The impossibly low metal degradation ratio, the Motive Force being supplied with no identifiable source, the complete absence of thermal overload described in the sacred tech-designs. When you see the anchor-core, you will understand."

traits.locale_text: « Cette plateforme entière est remplie de preuves, profane. Le taux de dégradation métallique incroyablement faible, la Force Motrice fournie sans source identifiable, l'absence totale de surcharge thermique décrite dans les technoplans sacrés. Vous comprendrez tout en voyant le noyau ancestral. »

languages.text: "Die ganze Plattform strotzt vor Beweisen, {mf|Laie|Laiin}. Der unglaubliche Metallverschleiß, die ohne erkennbaren Ursprung eingespeiste Antriebskraft, das vollständige Fehlen der in den heiligen Techplänen beschriebenen Thermalüberladung. Wenn Ihr den Ankerkern seht, werdet Ihr verstehen."
